content:
- resumed task 22 from TO BE VERIFIED, ran deep skeptical verification with parallel inspection across api/config/dcs/debug/ha surfaces, and upgraded plan to Draft 2 with explicit deltas (added dcs_trust + snapshot_sequence in HA state response and auth precedence rules)
- executed implementation end-to-end: added /ha/state and /ha leader/switchover write/delete API handlers, strict request validation, typed response contract, role mapping updates, api token config fields with parser/default validation, fixture sweep for new ApiConfig fields, and expanded worker + bdd tests for new routes/auth/fallback behavior
- ran all required gates successfully after fixing one example compile break and one transient rust archive build hiccup: make check, make test, make test-bdd, make lint all pass; marked task 22 passing/done, ran task_switch, and added cross-task learnings to AGENTS.md
- next: pick up the new current task selected by Ralph and continue loop from that task file

- Read `.ralph/current_tasks.md` and applied bug-first selection rules exactly.
- Confirmed all bug tasks are passing (`<passes>true</passes>`), then evaluated remaining `<passes>false</passes>` tasks and blockers.
- Chose `.ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/24-task-real-e2e-harness-3nodes-3etcd.md` as the most strategic unblocked next task because it unlocks the largest downstream e2e chain; wrote this path to `.ralph/current_task.txt`.

- loaded prior progress via .ralph/progress_read.sh and resolved current task from .ralph/current_task.txt to task 24 (real e2e harness 3 nodes + 3 etcd)
- performed parallel research across harness/e2e/modules: src/test_harness/{etcd3,ports,mod,namespace}.rs, src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs, src/dcs/etcd_store.rs tests, Makefile, and task lifecycle examples
- confirmed baseline gap: e2e currently starts 3 pgtuskmaster nodes with only 1 etcd member and single endpoint wiring
- wrote a full Draft 1 execution plan into .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/24-task-real-e2e-harness-3nodes-3etcd.md under <execution_plan>, including 12 research tracks, concrete module-level changes, phased execution, and 15 parallel implementation tracks
- appended lifecycle marker TO BE VERIFIED at end of task file per workflow, did not execute implementation yet
- next step for following turn: run deep skeptical verification with 16+ parallel verification tracks, alter at least one concrete plan item, document delta rationale, and replace marker with NOW EXECUTE
